response.justification: Candidate is an accomplished full-stack software developer with strong web, mobile, and some embedded experience, but the role requires deep hardware/AI accelerator expertise — SoC and IP modeling, deep neural network optimization, GPU architecture, and hardware-software co-design — none of which appear on the resume. The technical background is almost entirely application-layer (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, web/mobile), with no evidence of performance architecture work on AI accelerators or silicon-level modeling.
strengths: Strong senior-level software engineering experience across multiple stacks and domains
Some low-latency systems work at Sociomantic handling millions of requests/sec
Bachelor's in Computer Science plus 14+ years of professional experience meets baseline education/experience threshold
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or silicon architecture experience
No deep learning, AI accelerator, or GPU architecture/workload analysis background
No SIMD/MIMD architecture work or performance analysis of DNN training/inference

key_factors.factor: AI accelerator and DNN optimization experience
Senior software engineering breadth and longevity
